Metadata.homeTitle: Alpha Investor | Investment Portfolio Tracker & Analysis
Metadata.homeDescription: Track and analyze your stock portfolio across brokers. Import holdings, get portfolio analytics, live market data, and explained AI insights on iOS.
Metadata.privacyDescription: How Alpha Investor collects and protects your data.
Metadata.termsDescription: Terms of use for Alpha Investor.
Metadata.partnersDescription: Market data and API partnerships for portfolio intelligence at scale.

Home.headline: Investment portfolio tracking and analysis — built for serious retail investors.
Home.subhead: Import holdings from leading brokers, enrich every position with licensed market data, and get explained portfolio analytics and AI insights on mobile — without sharing broker passwords.
Home.heroImageAlt: Alpha Investor screen showing five lenses: trend, valuation, risk, growth, and momentum.
Home.heroDeckWalletAlt: Portfolio view with allocation and performance.
Home.heroDeckChartAlt: Instrument detail with chart and performance.
Home.trustBrokersLine: XTB, Interactive Brokers, Degiro, Trading 212, Revolut, Robinhood, mBank eMakler, and generic CSV/Excel.
Home.platformIntro: Alpha Investor is not a watchlist app. It is infrastructure that turns fragmented broker exports into a single, analyzable book.
Home.platformPillar1Body: Import open positions and history from broker exports. No live broker credentials — your files are processed with privacy-first controls.
Home.platformPillar2Body: Server-side quotes, reference fields, and symbol validation power charts and analytics for every holding.
Home.platformPillar3Body: Allocation, performance, risk lenses, and AI readouts weighted to your actual portfolio — every signal with reasoning.
Home.dataIntro: Every portfolio drives sustained API consumption: symbol resolution, live and historical pricing, and fundamentals-style reference data for analytics and AI context.
Home.dataBullet1: Batch quote and reference lookups per portfolio sync
Home.dataBullet2: Symbol validation across US, European, and other listed markets (via exchange-qualified tickers)
Home.dataBullet3: Fundamentals-style fields feeding valuation and lens scores
Home.dataBullet4: Designed for high-cardinality retail portfolios — many symbols, many users
Home.brokersIntro: Retail investors hold assets across multiple brokers. Alpha Investor ingests export files — not brokerage API credentials — to unify the book.
Home.brokersCallout: Files are processed on-device where possible; we never ask for your broker login.
Home.engineTitle: Portfolio intelligence, not another charting app
Home.engineIntro: Wallet-level analytics, consistent scoring across holdings, and explained AI readouts — built for how you actually invest.
Home.engineFeature2: Five-lens scores (trend, valuation, risk, growth, momentum) with plain-English rationale
Home.engineFeature3: Instrument deep dives: chart, context, and explained signals in one scroll
Home.engineFeature4: Scenario tools to test allocation changes before you act
Home.aiExplain: You see what changed, why it matters, and where to focus next.
Home.aiProHook: No black box. Every signal is explained so you can decide with confidence.
Home.aiPillar1Body: Explained analytics and AI readouts on top of your real portfolio weights.
Home.aiPillar2Body: You get context tied to your book — not isolated numbers or generic watchlists.
Home.aiPillar3Body: Use each explained signal to choose your next step — you stay in control.
Home.benefitsIntro: Outcomes that matter when you manage real money across brokers.
Home.benefit1Body: One view of allocation and performance when holdings live in multiple accounts.
Home.benefit2Body: Plain-language signals on mix and concentration — meant to inform, not panic.
Home.benefit3Title: Compare holdings on a consistent model
Home.benefit3Body: The same five-lens scale on every ticker with rationale you can scan in seconds.
Home.benefit4Body: Every score links to factors behind it — no black-box predictions or hype.
Home.benefit5Body: Charts, fundamentals-style context, and AI in one flow — not six browser tabs.
Home.securityIntro: We are building portfolio software retail investors can trust with sensitive holdings data.
Home.securityBullet1: No broker credential collection — import via export files only
Home.securityBullet2: Portfolio insights generated for your account; we do not train public models on your book
Home.securityBullet3: Educational software only — not investment, tax, or legal advice
Home.securityAppNote: In-app security and data handling are described in the Alpha Investor iOS app.
Home.scaleIntro: We are a small team today, building the data and import layer retail portfolio software will need at millions of users.
Home.scaleBullet1: Thousands of portfolios → millions of symbol lookups
Home.scaleBullet4: AI analytics layered on deterministic portfolio math
Home.featuresIntro: Portfolios, charts, and explained readouts in one steady flow.
Home.feature1Body: Plain-language heads-up on mix and concentration across your book.
Home.feature2Body: Same scale on every ticker with a line of rationale — compare quickly without building your own factor sheet.
Home.feature3Body: Chart, performance, fundamentals-style context, and narrative readouts in one scroll.
Home.feature4Body: Multiple books and lots, server-backed quotes, and insights for your account only.
Home.step1Body: Import a broker export (XTB, IBKR, Degiro, and more) or create a portfolio manually with your positions and base currency.
Home.step2Body: Charts, quotes, reference fields, and symbol validation pull from licensed market data on the server.
Home.step3Body: Use wallet and per-name readouts as a brief: what looks stretched, what looks balanced — then decide on your terms.
Home.pricingTitle: Plans for portfolio tracking and AI analytics
Home.pricingTagline: $10/month for the full explained intelligence layer on your portfolio.
Home.pricingFreeBullet1: Portfolios, live quotes, and charts — without premium AI readouts.
Home.pricingFreeBullet2: Same account privacy — nothing is trained on your book for public models.
Home.pricingFreeBullet3: Upgrade under Settings → Subscription on iOS when you are ready.
Home.pricingProBullet1: Wallet + every holding narrated off YOUR weights — not a generic watchlist.
Home.pricingProBullet2: Five lenses on every ticker with plain-English rationale you can scan in seconds.
Home.pricingProBullet3: Instrument screen: chart, fundamentals-style context, and AI in one scroll.
Home.pricingProBullet4: Future Pro-only features ship here first.
Home.pricingDisclaimerLine: Educational software only — markets stay risky. We sell clarity on your own data, not promises of returns.
Home.pricingFootnote: Purchases run inside the Alpha Investor app via Apple In-App Purchase on iOS (price may vary by region). Google Play billing is on the roadmap. Cancel from your device subscription settings.
Home.screensIntro: Portfolio tracking, charts, and explained signals — designed for mobile.
Home.galleryWalletValueTitle: See if your plan is working
Home.galleryWalletValueBody: Portfolio value over time with simple range controls — see the arc without jumping between tools.
Home.galleryWalletAllocationBody: See allocation, exposure, and performance in one place.
Home.galleryPortfolioInsightBody: Clear signals with context — every score with reasoning.
Home.galleryFiveLensesBody: Trend, valuation, growth, risk, and momentum in one view.
Home.galleryFundamentalsBody: Every signal links to the factors behind it.
Home.galleryOptimizerBody: Test changes before you act on your portfolio.
Home.galleryNewsBody: Use market context to filter noise and focus on decisions.
Home.faq1A: No. Alpha Investor is software plus educational context. We are not a fiduciary and do not know your full finances — you stay in charge of trades and taxes.
Home.faq2A: Export open positions or history from your broker (CSV/Excel where supported), then import in the app. We do not connect to your broker with your login — file-based imports only.
Home.faq3A: Import templates for XTB, Interactive Brokers, Degiro, Trading 212, Revolut, Robinhood, mBank eMakler, plus a generic path for other CSV/Excel exports. Coverage expands over time.
Home.faq4Q: Where does market data come from?
Home.faq4A: Licensed market data providers on our servers — quotes, reference fields, and symbol validation. We do not use other users' portfolio data as a data source.
Home.faq5A: Explained readouts on your wallet and holdings — what changed, why it matters, and factors behind each signal. Alpha Pro adds the full layer across your book.
Home.faq6A: iOS today. Android is on the roadmap — join the waitlist for timing.
Home.faq7A: Free includes portfolios, quotes, and charts without premium AI. Alpha Pro is $10/month for full explained intelligence — subscribe in the iOS app via the App Store.
Home.faq8Q: Do you train public models on my portfolio?
Home.faq8A: No. Insights are generated for your account from your data and licensed feeds under our privacy terms.
Home.faq9Q: What happens after I join the waitlist?
Home.faq9A: Occasional email about releases and Android timing. Unsubscribe anytime.
Home.faq10Q: Are you a broker or custodian?
Home.faq10A: No. We do not hold assets, route orders, or provide personalized investment advice. You manage trades at your brokers.
Home.faq11Q: I'm a data or API provider — how do we partner?
Home.faq11A: Email partners@alphainvestor.app with your data products and use cases. We consume quotes, reference data, and symbol validation at portfolio scale.
Home.faq12A: We design for privacy-first imports (no broker passwords), account-scoped insights, and standard security practices. See our Privacy policy and in-app notices for details.
Home.ctaSub: Download on iOS or join early access for Android and major releases.
Home.formConsent: By joining, you agree we may email you about the product. See
Home.disclaimer: Not investment, tax, or legal advice. AI text can be incomplete or stale — double-check anything that would change your money.
Home.roadmapIntro: Directional phases — no dates. Order may change; join the waitlist for release notes when we ship.
Home.roadmapFootnote: Roadmap items are plans, not commitments.
Home.roadmapPhase1Body: Portfolios, broker imports, live quotes, charts, and first explained AI readouts on wallet and holdings.
Home.roadmapPhase2Body: Richer lens models, import coverage, and portfolio stress views on mobile.
Home.roadmapPhase3Body: Same multi-broker experience on a second platform.
Home.roadmapPhase4Body: Broader asset classes, institutional-grade data partnerships, and infrastructure for millions of retail portfolios.
Home.appStoreBadgeAria: Download Alpha Investor on the App Store

Form.subtitle: iOS is live. Join for Android timing and major releases.

Form.errorRateLimited: Try again in a few minutes.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Jakub Gruszczyk QBKSHOP (NIP 6423222018) ("Alpha Investor", "we", "us", or "our"), collects, uses, stores, and shares personal information when you use our website or join our early-access waitlist. If you disagree with this policy, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 1. Who is responsible for your data?
paragraphs: The controller of your personal data is Jakub Gruszczyk QBKSHOP (NIP 6423222018).
For privacy-related requests, contact us at privacy@alphainvestor.app.
This policy supplements notices shown on this website (for example, cookie consent prompts).

sections.title: 2. Scope
paragraphs: This policy covers personal information processed through (a) public marketing pages on this website and (b) early-access or waitlist forms.
We do not provide brokerage, custody, or order-routing services. We are not your investment adviser or fiduciary.

sections.title: 3. Information we collect on the website
paragraphs: When you browse our website, we and our hosting providers may process technical data such as IP address, approximate location derived from IP, browser type, device identifiers, pages viewed, referring URLs, and timestamps. We use this information to operate, secure, and improve the site, and to measure basic performance.

If you enable optional analytics (for example, privacy-preserving web analytics provided by our hosting vendor), we may collect aggregated usage statistics. Depending on configuration, analytics may rely on cookies or similar technologies.

sections.title: 4. Waitlist and email communications
paragraphs: If you join an early-access waitlist, we collect the information you submit (typically email address, and optionally your name), along with your preferred language where you provide it. We may also process bot-mitigation signals when you complete a challenge (for example, Cloudflare Turnstile).

Waitlist data is used to manage access, send product updates you have requested or consented to, and improve onboarding. Messages may be delivered through our email delivery provider (for example, Resend), including optional welcome emails when enabled.
You can unsubscribe from marketing emails using the link in those emails, where applicable. Transactional or service-related messages may still be sent where necessary to operate the service.

sections.title: 5. Product data and AI usage
paragraphs: At this time, this policy applies only to the website and waitlist flows described above.
We do not use your personal data submitted through the website or waitlist to train publicly available foundation models.

sections.title: 6. Purposes and legal bases (EEA, UK, and similar jurisdictions)
paragraphs: Where GDPR or similar laws apply, we rely on one or more of the following legal bases: performance of a contract (providing the service you request), consent (for example, marketing emails or optional analytics, where required), legitimate interests (for example, securing our services, preventing abuse, improving reliability, and understanding aggregate product usage), and legal obligations.
You may withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent. Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal.

sections.title: 7. Cookies and similar technologies
paragraphs: Our website may use cookies, local storage, or similar technologies that are strictly necessary for security and core functionality, and (where enabled) analytics technologies as described above.
Browser or device settings may let you refuse some cookies; refusing strictly necessary cookies can affect site functionality.

sections.title: 8. How we share information
paragraphs: We share personal information with service providers who process data on our instructions ("processors"), including hosting and analytics (Vercel), email delivery and waitlist management (Resend), bot mitigation (Cloudflare Turnstile), and database infrastructure for anti-abuse/rate limiting (Neon/Postgres). We may also disclose information if required by law, to respond to lawful requests, or to protect rights, safety, and security.

We do not sell your personal information for money. Where required by applicable U.S. state privacy laws, we honor applicable rights regarding targeted advertising, sale, or sharing as those terms are defined by law.

sections.title: 9. International transfers
paragraphs: We may process and store information in the European Economic Area and in other countries where we or our providers operate. If we transfer personal data from the EEA, UK, or Switzerland to countries not deemed adequate by the relevant regulator, we use appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses (and UK Addendum where applicable), supplemented by technical and organizational measures where required.

sections.title: 10. Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal information for as long as needed to provide the service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements. Waitlist records are generally retained until you unsubscribe or request deletion, or until they are no longer needed for access management, subject to a reasonable cooling-off period for backups and logs.
Technical logs may be retained for shorter periods in line with security and troubleshooting needs, unless a longer period is required by law.

sections.title: 11. Security
paragraphs: We implement technical and organizational measures designed to protect personal information, including access controls, encryption in transit where appropriate for the architecture, and vendor due diligence. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure; we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 12. Your rights and choices
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, rectify, erase, restrict, or object to certain processing, and to data portability. You may also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
To exercise rights, contact us at privacy@alphainvestor.app. We may need to verify your request. If you are in the EEA/UK, you may also contact your local data protection authority.

sections.title: 13. Children
paragraphs: Alpha Investor is not directed to children under 16 (or the minimum age required in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, contact us and we will take appropriate steps to delete it.

sections.title: 14. Automated decision-making
paragraphs: Our website and waitlist do not make automated decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects about you within the meaning of Article 22 GDPR.

sections.title: 15. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page and revise the "Last updated" date. Where changes are material and required by law, we will provide additional notice (for example, on-site message or email).

Privacy.localeNote: You are viewing this page in English.

Terms.title: Terms of use
Terms.intro: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Alpha Investor website and waitlist, operated by Jakub Gruszczyk QBKSHOP (NIP 6423222018) ("Alpha Investor", "we", "us", or "our"). By accessing or using the services, you agree to these Terms.

sections.title: 1. Agreement to these Terms
paragraphs: If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use our services. If you are using the services on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.
Additional terms may apply to specific features (for example, third-party data terms). If there is a conflict, the more specific terms govern only for that feature.

sections.title: 2. The services
paragraphs: Alpha Investor currently provides a marketing website and a waitlist flow for early access updates. Features and availability may change during early access.
The website may include a waitlist or marketing forms. Submitting a waitlist request does not guarantee access, timing, or any particular feature set.

sections.title: 3. Not investment, tax, or legal advice; no brokerage
paragraphs: Alpha Investor is not a broker-dealer, investment adviser, financial planner, tax adviser, attorney, or fiduciary. Nothing in the services constitutes personalized investment advice, an offer to buy or sell any security, or a recommendation to take or refrain from any investment action.

Market data may be delayed, incomplete, or incorrect. Past performance is not indicative of future results. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions and for verifying information with independent professionals and official sources.

sections.title: 4. Eligibility
paragraphs: You must be at least the age of majority in your jurisdiction (and at least 16, or higher if required locally) to use the services. If you cannot meet this requirement, do not use the services.

sections.title: 5. Waitlist communications
paragraphs: If you submit your details through the waitlist form, you agree to provide accurate information.
Joining the waitlist does not create a user account, subscription, or entitlement to immediate access.

sections.title: 6. Acceptable use
paragraphs: You agree not to misuse the services, including: probing, scanning, or testing vulnerabilities without authorization; interfering with service operation; attempting to access data that is not yours; reverse engineering except to the extent permitted by law; distributing malware; sending spam; scraping at a rate or scale that harms the service; or using the services to violate law or third-party rights.
We may investigate violations and cooperate with law enforcement. We may suspend or terminate access for conduct that we reasonably believe violates these Terms or creates risk.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
paragraphs: The services, including software, branding, text, graphics, and layouts, are owned by Alpha Investor or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. Subject to these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the services for your personal, non-commercial purposes, unless we agree otherwise in writing.
You retain rights in content you submit, but you grant us a license to host, process, transmit, and display that content solely to operate and improve the services for you.

sections.title: 8. Third-party services and data
paragraphs: The services may integrate or link to third-party services, data providers, and websites. Those third parties have their own terms and privacy practices. We are not responsible for third-party services or for the accuracy of third-party data.

sections.title: 9. Disclaimers
paragraphs: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
Some jurisdictions do not allow certain disclaimers; in those jurisdictions, disclaimers apply to the fullest extent permitted.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT WILL ALPHA INVESTOR OR ITS SUPPLIERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, GOODWILL, OR BUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICES, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY.

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, OUR TOTAL LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIM ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THE SERVICES WILL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNTS YOU PAID TO US FOR THE SERVICES IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS BEFORE THE EVENT GIVING RISE TO LIABILITY, OR (B) FIFTY US DOLLARS (USD 50).
Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations; in those jurisdictions, limitations apply to the fullest extent permitted.

sections.title: 11. Indemnity
paragraphs: You will defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Alpha Investor and its affiliates, directors, officers, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of your misuse of the services, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of applicable law or third-party rights.

sections.title: 12. Changes
paragraphs: We may modify the services or these Terms at any time. If we make material changes, we will provide reasonable notice where required by law (for example, by posting an updated policy or in-app notice). Your continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms, except where non-waivable law requires otherwise.

sections.title: 13. Suspension and termination
paragraphs: We may suspend or discontinue the services, or suspend or terminate your access, at any time with or without notice, including for maintenance, security, legal compliance, or business reasons. You may stop using the services at any time.
Provisions that by their nature should survive termination (including intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, indemnity, and governing law) will survive.

sections.title: 14. Governing law and disputes
paragraphs: Unless mandatory consumer protection laws in your country of residence provide otherwise, these Terms are governed by the laws of Poland, without regard to conflict-of-law rules that would require application of another jurisdiction's laws.

If you are a consumer habitually resident in the European Economic Area, you may benefit from mandatory protections of the laws of your country of residence, and you may bring proceedings in the courts of your place of residence where those laws so require. For business users, you agree that the courts of Poland have exclusive jurisdiction, subject to non-waivable law.

sections.title: 15. Miscellaneous
paragraphs: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and Alpha Investor regarding the subject matter and supersede prior understandings on the same subject. If any provision is unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect. Our failure to enforce a provision is not a waiver. You may not assign these Terms without our consent; we may assign them in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets.
Contact us at privacy@alphainvestor.app for questions about these Terms.

Partners.title: Data & API partnerships
Partners.intro: Alpha Investor is a mobile-first portfolio intelligence platform. Every user portfolio drives sustained consumption of quotes, reference data, and symbol validation across global listings.
Partners.dataBody: Live and batch quotes, fundamentals-style reference fields, corporate actions context, and symbol resolution for multi-broker retail portfolios. We integrate via licensed market data APIs on our servers — not by scraping broker sites.
Partners.volumeBody: Retail investors hold diversified books across brokers. Imports increase symbol cardinality per account; refreshes and analytics multiply lookups. We are building for thousands of portfolios today and infrastructure that can serve millions.
Partners.contactBody: Share your data products, licensing model, and sample coverage maps. We respond to qualified partnership inquiries at:
Partners.disclaimer: This page is for business development only. It does not constitute an offer to purchase data or a commitment to integrate any specific vendor.
